@@ -57,0 +57,7 @@
+# Special handling for environments that report Cygwin despite being MSYS
+case `uname -s` in
+  MSYS*)
+    MSYSTEM_CHOST=`echo $MSYSTEM_CHOST | sed 's/cygwin/msys/'`
+    ;;
+esac
+
